content:
Charlap Hyman & Herrero converts factory into cavernous Pocketbook Hudson hotel

US studio Charlap Hyman & Herrero has transformed a former pocketbook factory in Hudson, New York, into a hotel that riffs on the industrial aesthetic and includes multiple artist commissions. Charlap Hyman & Herrero, which was announced as the winner of Cooper Hewitt's National Design Award for Interior Design this week, turned the vast 1883
